## Summary

Describe the capability you want.

## Problem statement

What workflow is blocked or inefficient today?

## Proposed behavior

Describe the smallest useful version of the change.

## Scope check

Confirm this request does not depend on out-of-scope product areas unless the request is intentionally proposing a scope change.

- [ ] No local git CLI workflow required
- [ ] No filesystem editing required
- [ ] No shell execution required
- [ ] No browser automation required
- [ ] No HTTP transport required in v1

## Additional context

Add examples, GitHub API references, or related issues if helpful.
